title: Anchor Peabody Represents Encore Building Products in its Sale to Builders FirstSource
text: DELRAY BEACH, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Anchor Peabody is pleased to announce that it has represented Encore Building Products (“Encore”), a leading distributor and retailer of lumber, flooring, and other building materials, in its sale to Builders FirstSource (NYSE: BLDR), the nation's largest supplier of structural building products and value-added components and services to the professional residential construction market. Headquartered in Springdale, Arkansas, Encore serves professional contra.

title: Builders FirstSource Hosts 2023 Investor Day
text: IRVING, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Builders FirstSource, Inc. (NYSE: BLDR) (“Builders FirstSource” or the "Company") will host its 2023 Investor Day today in Atlanta, beginning at 8:30 a.m. EST. The formal presentations are expected to conclude at approximately 11:30 a.m. EST. title: Builders FirstSource: Ready For 2024, A Bargain Opportunity, 7x FCF
text: Builders FirstSource reported earnings for a challenging period, but comparisons with this year will be crucial for its prospects in mid-2024. The business is attractively priced at 7x next year's free cash flows, with numerous compelling aspects that make it a worthwhile investment. BLDR's revenue growth rates are improving, and analysts believe it will deliver mid-single-digit growth rates in 2024, making it a highly profitable investment.

title: Pivot Pending
text: U.S. equity markets notched a fifth-straight week of gains as benchmark interest rates continued a decisive retreat after economic data and comments from Fed officials fueled bets on a pending pivot. Advancing for a fifth-straight week since dipping into "correction territory" at the end of October, the S&P 500 gained another 0.8% on the week, while Mid-Caps and Small-Caps gained 2%. Lifted by the rate retreat, real estate equities were again the leaders this week. The Equity REIT Index rallied 5.0% this week, extending their rebound since late-October to nearly 20%.

title: Uber Technologies, Jabil and Builders FirstSource Set to Join S&P 500; Others to Join S&P MidCap 400 and S&P SmallCap 600
text: NEW YORK , Dec. 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- S&P Dow Jones Indices ("S&P DJI") will make the following changes to the S&P 500, S&P MidCap 400, and S&P SmallCap 600 indices effective prior to the open of trading on Monday, December 18, to coincide with the quarterly rebalance. The changes ensure each index is more representative of its market capitalization range.
